caption: A small, square electronic integrated circuit chip with a dark body and metallic pins rests on a smooth, light-gray surface. In the initial scene, the chip is blurred and positioned in the distance. As the sequence progresses, the camera moves closer and the focus sharpens, revealing a grid of small circular indentations on the top surface of the chip. The object remains stationary on the flat background, but the camera's perspective shifts, moving from a distant, out-of-focus shot to a closer, clear view, and finally shifting slightly to show the chip from a side-angled perspective. No people, text, or other equipment are visible in the frames.
